metadata.description: Tesla Robotaxi fleet size data from robotaxitracker.com (scraped) and news sources
metadata.notes: Austin vehicles are true robotaxis (unsupervised ADS). Bay Area vehicles have human safety drivers. Data from Aug 2025 onwards is scraped from robotaxitracker.com chart tooltips. Active vehicle counts (austin_active_vehicles, bayarea_active_vehicles) represent vehicles actually on the road, which is a subset of total fleet. MPI calculations are available for both total fleet (austin_vehicles) and active fleet (austin_active_vehicles). The dashboard supports toggling between the two.

validation.source: Tesla Q3 2025 earnings, ARK Invest research

assumptions.notes: Tesla reported 250,000 miles by end of Q3 2025 with ~20 avg vehicles = ~129 mi/vehicle/day. Waymo averages ~80 mi/vehicle/day (200K miles/day ÷ 2,500 vehicles). Tesla higher due to Austin's spread-out geography. Using 115 as moderate (accounting for weather/maintenance downtime).
